items.title: Wacaco Nanopresso Arctic Blue, tokkal
items.desc: Hordozható kávéfőző Wacaco Nanopresso Arctic Blue, tokkal: The Wacaco Nanopresso coffee machine allows you to prepare delicious fresh coffee at the campsite, on a trip, holiday or on a hiking tour. It does not need any …
items.raw_desc: Hordozható kávéfőző Wacaco Nanopresso Arctic Blue, tokkal:        The Wacaco Nanopresso coffee machine allows you to prepare delicious fresh coffee at the campsite, on a trip, holiday or on a hiking tour. It does not need any source of energy for its operation, it is enough to pour hot water into it, which you can also store in a thermos, add coffee and then prepare coffee with a few presses of the piston. Nanopresso can reach a pressure of up to 18 bar and works ideally with finely ground coffee. It excels in its very low weight, so it is easy to carry and can hold up to 80 ml of water. The coffee machine includes a removable cup and both parts have a heat sink that absorbs heat and protects the hands. In addition, its maintenance takes only a few seconds and the package also includes a high-quality hard case. With the Wacaco Nanopresso coffee machine, you can enjoy fresh coffee anywhere.
